class.name: UserSettings
class.brief_description: Handles user settings in a centralized way.
class.description: Stores user settings in the [code]user://settings.cfg[/code] file and exposes a small API for reading and writing values grouped by section and key. Missing keys are filled with built-in defaults during [method load_config], so callers can safely read settings even when the config file does not exist yet or does not contain every supported option. The class also provides a dedicated helper for the configured Maszyna game directory.

method.name: get_maszyna_game_dir
method.description: Returns the configured Maszyna game directory. In release builds outside the editor this method always returns [code]"."[/code]. If the stored value is empty, [code]"."[/code] is returned as a fallback.

method.name: get_setting
method.description: Returns a setting value from the given config [param section] and [param key]. If the key does not exist, [param default_value] is returned.

method.name: load_config
method.description: Loads the config file from [code]user://settings.cfg[/code]. If the file does not exist yet, a new one is created with default values. After loading, any missing supported keys are added automatically.

method.name: save_maszyna_game_dir
method.description: Saves the Maszyna game directory path to the config file. This is a shortcut for writing the [code]maszyna/game_dir[/code] setting.

method.name: save_setting
method.description: Saves [param value] under the given config [param section] and [param key]. If the stored value changes, [signal setting_changed] and [signal config_changed] are emitted.

signal.name: config_changed
signal.description: Emitted after the config was loaded or after a setting value was changed and saved.

signal.name: setting_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a saved setting changes value.
